channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo weekly.

item.description:
👤 Owner: actionow-ai

📝 Repository: actionow-ai/actionow

📄 Descrizione: Action! Now! The open-source AI studio for screenwriting and storyboard production. 从剧本到分镜，从角色到成片，Actionow 把"开拍 · 此刻"变成创意团队。触手可及的工程化工作台——智能体驱动，开箱即接最新模型，可代码级控制、可私有化部署。

item.title: ☕ t1804330987/DD_Rag (33 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: t1804330987

📝 Repository: t1804330987/DD_Rag

📄 Descrizione: 基于 SpringAI 的 Agent 开发项目：一个面向“组织知识库 + AI 助手”的 RAG Agent实战项目，把权限隔离、文档入库、混合检索、证据约束、Agent 工具调用和 Docker 部署串成了一条完整工程链路。如果你正在找一个能写进简历、能讲清架构、能覆盖 SpringAI / SpringAIAlibaba面试、学习、技术点的项目，DD_Rag 值得 Star。

⭐ Stelle: 33

🍴 Forks: 3

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: rag springai springai-alibaba

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-23T04:48:50Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-26T15:37:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ java-up-up/super-agent (27 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: java-up-up

📝 Repository: java-up-up/super-agent

📄 Descrizione: 企业级 AI 智能体 Agent 平台，覆盖智能对话、文档知识问答、联网搜索、RAG 检索、MCP 工具协议、Skills 扩展等完整能力。三层执行器体系、双通道混合检索、组合式切块引擎、会话记忆管理、全链路可观测，每个环节都经过深 度设计和工程化打磨。

⭐ Stelle: 27

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: agent ai ai-agent llm mcp rag skills springai springai-alibaba

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-18T07:50:43Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-24T03:24:54Z

item.title: ☕ ZackSecurity/Zack-AI-Scanner (23 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ZackSecurity

📝 Repository: ZackSecurity/Zack-AI-Scanner

📄 Descrizione: Zack-AI-Scanner 是一款基于大语言模型的自动化 Web 漏洞扫描工具，作为 Burp Suite 扩展运行。通过 AI 深度学习技术自动分析 HTTP 请求特征，智能识别潜在安全漏洞，动态生成针对性测试Payload，并智能验证漏洞真实性。

⭐ Stelle: 23

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-13T00:29:48Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-17T21:24:50Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: Ishoula

📝 Repository: Ishoula/PesaTracker

📄 Descrizione: Pesa Tracker is a Java desktop app for managing personal finances. Users can record, categorize, and analyze expenses, generate reports, and visualize spending trends using charts. Built with PostgreSQL and JFreeChart, it provides simple and effective financial insights.
